titleStmt.title: SII 36.248: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 248. (A.R. No. 248 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the Nāchchiyār shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: Unfinished. Seems to register a sale of land by the assembly of Kōṭṭur alias Chōḻavichchādira-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kaṉṟūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Maṇayiṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. Also mentions Madurāntaka-nallūr, a village in the same kōṭṭam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
....svastiśrī pūmālai miṭaintu ponmālai tikaḻtarat tārmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷpuyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppat taṉ vaḷamār vantaṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷoru taniyiruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvakattiruppa Akilapuvaṉaṅ kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭaimmicai ciṟappat ticaitoṟun=tatikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappak karuṅkaliyoḷittu vaṉpilat tiṭaikkiṭappak kuḷattiṭait teluṅka vīmaṉ vilaṅkal micaiyeṟa
vuṅ kaliṅkar pūmiyaik kaṉaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭaitāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalattiraṅki yinitiruntu vaṭaticaiyaṭippaṭuttaruḷit teṉṟicait tarumamun=tavamun tāṉamun=taḻaippa vetamum meymaiyumātiyukam polat talaittalai ciṟappa van=taruḷi vilaṅkarum porpuliyāṉai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyirkkellā miṉṉuyirttāy poṟṟaṇṇaḷi parappit taṉittaṉi puran=ta taṉ koyiṟ koṟṟavācaṟpuṟattu maṇināvoṭuṅka muracukaṇ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum meṉ
meloṅkac ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac ceralar kaṭal puka Aḻitaru ciṅkaṇarañci neñcalamarak kaliṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kaṉṉaṭar veṉniṭak koṅkavarotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai maṉṉarun=tattamakkaraṇenat tirumalarc cevaṭiyurimai yiliṟaiñcat tollai Ēḻulakun=toḻuteḻat toṉṟi mullaivāṇakai mukkokkiḻānaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaraṉ Imaiyaccimaiyat tirun=tananeṉṟap porun=ti Uṭaniruppa Aṅkavaṉ makuḻuṅ kaṅkaiyoppākit terivaiyar tilatan=tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punitakuṇa
vanitai tiripuvaṉamuṭaiyāḷ Avantiruvuḷḷattaruḷ muḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉavuṭaniruppa cempon vīrasimhāsaṉattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Ēḻāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu maṇaiyiṟ koṭṭattuk kaṉṟūrṉāṭṭuk koṭṭūrāṉa coḻaviccātirac caturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu Ik koṭṭattu maturāntakanallūr
Digital edition of SII 36.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
